userResponsibilities.title: 1. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.content: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and for all activities conducted through their account. You must provide accurate information during registration.

acceptableUse.title: 2. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.content: The platform is for personal trading analysis. Reverse engineering, automated data scraping, or using the service to provide unauthorized financial advice is strictly prohibited.

subscription.title: 3. Subscription & Billing
subscription.content: Access to premium features requires a valid subscription. Fees are non-refundable unless specified in the Refund Policy. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days notice.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We collect trade data, authentication details, and platform usage metrics to provide AI insights. Your trade data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

analytics.title: Analytics & Cookies
analytics.content: We use essential cookies for session management and anonymized analytics to improve performance. We do not sell user data to third-party advertisers.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to export your data (via the Export Engine) or request permanent account deletion at any time through the settings panel.

risk.title: Risk Disclosure
risk.warningContent: Trading financial instruments involves significant risk of loss. You should only trade with capital you can afford to lose.

educational.title: Educational Purposes
educational.content: AITradeJournal provides analytics and journaling tools for educational use. We do not guarantee profitability, and past performance is not indicative of future results.

noAdvice.title: No Financial Advice
noAdvice.content: Our AI Coach and analytics metrics are based on mathematical models of your data. They do not constitute financial, investment, or legal advice.

toolLimitation.title: Tool Limitation
toolLimitation.content: This platform is a journaling and data analysis tool. It is NOT a trading platform, broker, or exchange. We do not execute trades or hold user funds.

accuracy.title: Accuracy of Data
accuracy.content: While we strive for 100% accuracy, users should verify critical calculations. We are not liable for losses resulting from data entry errors or system latency.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time. You will retain access until the end of the current billing cycle. No partial refunds are issued for unused time.

exceptions.title: Exceptions
exceptions.content: Refunds may be granted within 7 days of the initial purchase if the service is technically non-functional and our support team cannot resolve the issue.
